_comment: Tier-2 for skfem mixed_poisson#1: ElementTriRT0 is registered and Basis(MeshTri(), ElementTriRT0()).Nbfun == 3 (one normal-flux DOF per edge of a triangle). The full spelling 'ElementTriRaviartThomas' is NOT in skfem; the RT0/RT1/RT2 abbreviated names are the actual classes. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
